details: gh CLI v2.91.0 installed and on PATH, but `gh auth status` reports not logged in and %APPDATA%/GitHub CLI/hosts.yml does not exist. User confirmed completion of `gh auth login` twice but verification fails both times.
remediation: Run in a fresh PowerShell terminal: `gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web`. Verify with `gh auth status` BEFORE confirming completion. Then re-run this relay.
